_comment: Pools to track. Discovered via on-chain enumeration of SPL-stake-pool family programs (SPoo1Ku8..., SVSPxpvH..., SPMBzsVU...) sorted by total_lamports desc; names verified via Jupiter token list (https://lite-api.jup.ag/tokens/v2/tag?query=lst).
_format: { pool_address: string, name?: string, note?: string, added_at?: ISO8601 }
_seed_method: Helius getProgramAccounts for each family program → parse StakePool → sort by total_lamports → top 20 → resolve names via Jupiter LST tag list

additions.name: BNSOL
additions.note: Binance Staked SOL. Largest SPL-stake-pool by TVL; concentrated (small validator set).

additions.name: JitoSOL
additions.note: Largest verified Solana LST by TVL. MEV-focused.

additions.name: JagPool
additions.note: LATAM + Singapore + South Africa decentralisation focus. Closest peer to Definity on mission alignment.

additions.name: MXSOL
additions.note: Mexc Staked SOL. Mint 7cBuurYD... not in Jupiter LST tag list; name from Helius DAS metadata.

additions.name: BGSOL
additions.note: Bitget Staked SOL. Mint bgSoL... only in Jupiter's full token DB (tagged 'unknown'), not in the curated LST list.

additions.name: saveSOL
additions.note: Save Staked SOL. Mint SAVEDpx... — Jupiter full DB only, not curated LST list.

additions.name: ThetaSOL
additions.note: Theta Staked SOL. Mint J9fihFs... — Jupiter full DB only, not curated LST list.

additions.name: Definity
additions.note: Sanctum-Multi SPL stake-pool. APAC + EMEA emerging-markets focus.

additions.name: BdMLRsol
additions.note: Mint BdMLRC2g... — name field empty in Jupiter list, symbol only.
